description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the elixir:1.4 Docker image for most jobs and alpine for the coverage job, with stages build, test, post-test. Define a global variable MIX_ENV set to test. In the test stage add a test job that runs the shared before_script (apt-get update, mix local.hex --force, mix local.rebar --force, mix deps.get) then executes mix coveralls.html | tee cov.out, and stores cov.out and the cover/ directory as artifacts. Also in the test stage add a dogma job that uses the same before_script, overrides MIX_ENV to dev, runs mix dogma, and runs in the test stage. In the post-test stage add a coverage job that uses the alpine image, runs cat cov.out, and defines a coverage regex /\[TOTAL\]\s+(\d+\.\d+%)$/ to capture total coverage. No caches, rules, or deployment targets are defined.
